label: Hero
prompt: Create a premium hero shot with the full product clearly visible on a clean luxury background. Preserve exact packaging, label layout, colors, finish, cap, pump, and branding.

label: Lifestyle
prompt: Create a polished beauty editorial composition with tasteful supporting props and a premium vanity or skincare context. Keep the product fully visible and unchanged.

label: Wearable
prompt: Create a realistic in-use or contextual composition when applicable, while preserving the exact packaging and branding details of the product.

label: Wearable ethnic
prompt: Create a second premium beauty setup with different props and angle variation. Keep the product clearly visible and strictly faithful to the reference.

label: Jewellery Box
prompt: Create a premium product-first composition with refined surfaces and minimal beauty props. Preserve exact packaging geometry and branding layout.

label: Close Detail
prompt: Create a detail-focused close shot highlighting packaging material, finish, and applicator details without changing any branding or structure.
